title: Kalevala: Vainamoinen's Final Departure
description: The old sage sails away in a copper boat, leaving behind his songs — like Arthur departing for Avalon.
introduction: The old sage sails away in a copper boat, leaving behind his songs — like Arthur departing for Avalon.

translation.text: Vainamoinen sailed away in his copper boat, between the upper earth and the lower sky, and was seen no more.
